file_name: Eli Lilly - Clazakizumab licence from CSL Behring - Third-party questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Eli Lilly and Company and/or CSL Behring.
